name: launch_template_arn
description: The ARN of the launch template

name: launch_template_name
description: The name of the launch template

name: autoscaling_group_name
description: The autoscaling group name

name: autoscaling_group_min_size
description: The minimum size of the autoscale group

name: autoscaling_group_desired_capacity
description: The number of Amazon EC2 instances that should be running in the group

name: autoscaling_group_availability_zones
description: The availability zones of the autoscale group

name: autoscaling_group_load_balancers
description: The load balancer names associated with the autoscaling group

name: autoscaling_schedule_arns
description: ARNs of autoscaling group schedules

name: autoscaling_policy_arns
description: ARNs of autoscaling policies

name: iam_role_name
description: The name of the IAM role

name: iam_role_arn
description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) specifying the IAM role

name: iam_instance_profile_arn
description: ARN assigned by AWS to the instance profile

name: iam_instance_profile_id
description: Instance profile's ID

name: launch_template_latest_version
description: The latest version of the launch template

name: launch_template_default_version
description: The default version of the launch template

name: autoscaling_group_arn
description: The ARN for this AutoScaling Group

name: autoscaling_group_max_size
description: The maximum size of the autoscale group

name: autoscaling_group_health_check_grace_period
description: Time after instance comes into service before checking health

name: autoscaling_group_vpc_zone_identifier
description: The VPC zone identifier

name: autoscaling_group_target_group_arns
description: List of Target Group ARNs that apply to this AutoScaling Group

name: iam_role_unique_id
description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM role

name: launch_template_id
description: The ID of the launch template

name: autoscaling_group_id
description: The autoscaling group id

name: autoscaling_group_default_cooldown
description: Time between a scaling activity and the succeeding scaling activity

name: autoscaling_group_health_check_type
description: EC2 or ELB. Controls how health checking is done

name: autoscaling_group_enabled_metrics
description: List of metrics enabled for collection

name: iam_instance_profile_unique
description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM instance profile
